pages.text:
19920190 22.9.1992

AMBASSADE

D'IRLANDE

12, AVENUE FOCH, 95116 PARIS

(ENTRÉE CHANCELLERTE 4, RCE RUDE)

L'Ambassade d'Irlande présente ses compliments au Ministère des Affaires

Etrangères et se réfère à la Convention pour la protection du milieu marin de l'atlantique du Nord Est.

L'Ambassade d'Irlande a l'honneur de remettre au Ministère des Affaires Etrangères l'instrument de ratification par l'Irlande de la Convention pour la protection du milieu marin de l'atlantique du Nord Est.

L'Ambassade d'Irlande saisit cette occasion pour renouveler Ministère des Affaires

Etrangères les assurances de sa haute considération.

Paris, le 11 août 1997

CENt PLACE

PARIS.

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères

Direction Générale des Affaires

Européennes et Economiques

Direction des Affaires Economiques et Financières

Ref : 1660 DE/ECS 37 Quai d'Orsay 75351 PARIS

TELEPHONE 01 44 17 67 00 -

07 00 1 01 44 37 68 0 ( & }

Ireland

Ratification of the Convention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the North East

Atlantic

WHEREAS the Convention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the North Ea avironment was done at Paris on the twenty-second day of September 1992

AND WHEREAS the said Convention was signed, subject to ratification, on behalf of Ireland on the twenty-second day of September 1992;

AND WHEREAS Dail Fireann approved the terms of the said Convention on the twenty-ninth day of April 1997;

AND WHEREAS the Government of Ireland have seen the said Convention and have deemed it approprate that it be ratified by Ireland;

NOW, THEREFORE, 1, Ray Burke, I.D., Minister for Foreign Affairs of Ireland, hereby ratify the Carvention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the North East Atlantic on behalf of Ireland.

Given at Dublin under my Official Seal this 24 day of July 1997.

Ray Burke T.D

Minister for Foreign Affairs of Ireland
